overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a walk through a lush urban park with futuristic vertical lighting, encountering three NPCs in a small clearing, then moving into dense vegetation. The scene features high-quality ray-traced lighting with dappled sunlight filtering through dense tree canopy.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a hexagonal paved path in a dense urban park, passing a massive graffiti-covered boulder on the left while futuristic vertical lamps line the right side of the trail. Sunlight filters through the dense tree canopy creating dappled shadows on the path.

segments.scene_description: The path continues through dense forest as the large boulder falls behind. Futuristic lamps line the route and distant glass buildings become visible through the tree canopy, indicating an urban park setting.

segments.scene_description: Entering a small clearing where three NPCs are gathered - one crouching near a futuristic lamp post examining the ground, two standing nearby. A stone bench sits against the rock wall as the camera circles the group, revealing tattooed details and casual clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense undergrowth at forest edge overlooking distant clearing

sunlit open area visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving past the NPC group into thick undergrowth and bushes, the camera pushes through dense vegetation. The view opens slightly to show a distant sunlit clearing or road through the dense forest canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a lush urban park that transitions from a structured paved trail into a wild, overgrown thicket. It begins by moving along a hexagonal path under a dense canopy of dappled sunlight, passing a massive graffiti-covered boulder and a line of futuristic vertical lamps. As the boulder recedes, the camera pushes deeper into the forest where the silhouettes of distant glass buildings emerge through the foliage. The scene then opens into a small clearing where the camera circles a group of three NPCs gathered near a stone bench and a lamp post, capturing the fine details of their tattoos and clothing. Finally, the movement pushes past the group and plunges into thick undergrowth and bushes, eventually revealing a glimpse of a sunlit road through the heavy vegetation.
